# Fire Displaces 11 People in Chesterfield Townhouses

**TL;DR:** A townhouse fire in Chesterfield left 11 people without immediate housing.

A fire broke out at a townhouse complex in Chesterfield County, spreading across multiple units and displacing 11 residents. Emergency responders worked to contain the blaze and assist those affected.

**Why it matters:** The incident highlights fire safety concerns in residential communities and the local emergency response capacity to handle multi-unit disasters.
